case_title: SAM TANG VS. FRONTIER AIRLINE INC.

REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2024 BY JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF SAM TANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINE INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH ZIMMERMAN. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
